title: add: use fileutils.PatternMatcher for .dockerignore
body: Use a fileutiles.PatternMatcher, which works better for this case than filepath.Match, to check if an item that we're copying is marked for exclusion by .dockerignore.

comments.body: @QiWang19 could you review this and give it a quick test run or three please?
Happy tests, going to merge this.
